title: RESPONSIBLE VENDOR PROGRAM
doc_html:
CHAPTER 8.  RESPONSIBLE VENDOR PROGRAM

§931.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Responsible Vendor Program".

Acts 1997, No. 1054, §1.
